title: Dependabot CI Hardening & Dependency Bump Merge Strategy

tasks.title: Document the Dependabot CI Build failure baseline (absent secrets)
tasks.description: Capture the exact failing step and log references for PRs #1548 and #1570: the admin Build fails because secrets.HOSPEDA_API_URL / VITE_API_URL / VITE_SITE_URL are empty in the Dependabot run context, failing URL validation. Record before-state in progress.md so the fix can be verified against it. No code changes.

tasks.title: Make CI Build resilient to absent secrets (Dependabot context)
tasks.description: Implement the chosen option from spec §3.1 (Option A — build-time placeholder URLs recommended) in the CI workflow Build step, so the admin build succeeds when secrets.* are empty. Add a guard ensuring production/deploy builds NEVER accept placeholder values (keep deploy validation strict). Do not weaken validation for push/branch-PR runs.

tasks.title: Update .github/dependabot.yml grouping & major isolation
tasks.description: Adjust grouping so patch/minor updates batch per ecosystem while MAJOR updates get isolated PRs (never folded into a minor/patch group). Pin/ignore or label migration-gated packages (zod, @tanstack/react-router) so a breaking major never rides in on an otherwise-green PR. Set sane open-pull-requests-limit and cadence to avoid 60+ update floods.

tasks.title: Re-validate PR #1548 passes CI after the build fix
tasks.description: Re-run CI on PR #1548 (github-actions group bump) and confirm Build + CI Pass go green with the absent-secrets fix from T-002. If green, the PR becomes mergeable per policy.
tasks.note: Confirmed end-to-end: after rebasing onto staging (which carries the secrets/flag fix #1587 + esbuild fix #1589), #1548 went fully green (CI Pass SUCCESS) and was merged. Exposed and fixed a follow-up bug: the ALLOW_PLACEHOLDER_ENV_URLS flag had to be workflow-wide, not just the Build step (#1587), because it is in Turbo globalEnv and downstream jobs re-run admin#build.

tasks.title: Triage PR #1570 per the new strategy (peel off breaking majors)
tasks.description: Split the 66-update group: peel off the breaking bumps (zod 4.4.3, @tanstack/react-router 1.170) into their migration specs (SPEC-132 / SPEC-045 or dedicated follow-ups), and confirm the safe remainder passes CI with the build fix. Do NOT implement the migrations here (out of scope).
tasks.note: Triage complete. The 69-bump production-minor-patch group carried THREE chained breaking changes (not two): zod 4.4.3 (.merge), @astrojs/node 10.1.4 (MISSING_EXPORT, needs astro >=6.4), and vite 8 vs astro-5 landing. Actions taken (T-009, PR #1605): landing excluded from CI + @astrojs/node ignored; zod/react-router ignores were pre-existing. The residual blocker — promoting dependabot.yml to main so the ignores take effect — is tracked as T-010. Mechanism verified; see spec sections 3.4/3.5.

tasks.title: Guard: production build must reject placeholder URLs
tasks.description: Add a CI guard or test asserting that a production/deploy-context build fails loudly when env URLs are placeholder/invalid, so the Option A placeholder approach cannot silently mask a real misconfiguration. Pairs with T-002.

tasks.title: Write docs/guides/dependabot-policy.md
tasks.description: Document the triage + merge flow for Dependabot PRs: the secrets/build caveat (why Dependabot runs lack secrets), how safe patch/minor groups are reviewed/merged (auto-merge candidacy), and how majors are routed to migration specs and never merged until migrated+validated. Cross-link from CI docs and apps/admin/CLAUDE.md.

tasks.title: Link SPEC-219 to the major-migration specs (owner handoff)
tasks.description: Cross-link SPEC-219 from SPEC-132 (Zod 4) and SPEC-045 (Vite/TanStack), or create dedicated follow-up migration specs if those are not the right home, so the Zod 4.4 and TanStack Router migrations have a clear owner and are not orphaned.

tasks.title: Exclude landing from CI + ignore @astrojs/node (production-minor-patch unblock)
tasks.description: Exclude the temporary hospeda-landing app (astro 5, breaks under vite 8) from the turbo-fanned CI tasks via --filter=!hospeda-landing, and add @astrojs/node to the dependabot ignore list (10.1.4 needs astro >=6.4; web pins 6.3.3). PR #1605 -> staging. See spec section 3.4.
tasks.note: Two config-only changes. Verified landing is out of turbo scope via dry-run; dependabot.yml validated as YAML. Does NOT take effect for Dependabot until dependabot.yml reaches main (see T-010).

tasks.title: Promote dependabot.yml ignores to main
tasks.description: Dependabot reads .github/dependabot.yml from the default branch (main), not target-branch (staging). Promote the config (zod / @tanstack/react-router / @astrojs/node ignores) to main so Dependabot honours it. Coordinated with the staging->main promotion (SPEC-220). Until then every production-minor-patch group PR regenerates red.
tasks.note: Highest-leverage fix. Options: a small dependabot.yml-only PR to main, or fold into the SPEC-220 staging->main promotion. Promotion #1594 was paused on pre-existing CodeQL debt.
